description.ko: 미학적 물리학을 탐구하는 PRISM-2는 백색광이 선명한 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 찰나의 순간을 포착하여, 수정을 통한 명료함과 변화를 상징적으로 보여줍니다.
description.en: Exploring the physics of beauty, PRISM-2 captures the precise moment white light shatters into a vibrant spectrum, symbolizing clarity and transformation through crystalline structures.

prompt: A cinematic high-resolution shot of a sharp-edged clear glass prism intercepting a concentrated beam of white light. The light refracts into a brilliant, wide spectrum of rainbow colors across a dark, minimalist surface. Soft caustic lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ray-traced reflections, and elegant bokeh in the background.
